meta.name: Wild Rose Rebellion (8-bit)
meta.tokenConvention: Every color key maps to a CSS custom property named --<key>. e.g. "accent" -> var(--accent). The group names (surfaces, lines, text, accents, crystals, states) are for human organization only and are NOT part of the variable name. The four crystal-* tokens are extra identity colors; wire them up where supported.
meta.notExportedYet: Non-color :root tokens. Like FF1, maintain sharp borders (--radius: 0px) and pure blocky Famicom aesthetics to match the era.

bg.desc: War-torn midnight backdrop - grim and less heroic than FF1

bg-soft.desc: Header elevation with a rose-tinted dusk cast

panel.desc: Imperial dossier panel tone - dark plum-brown

panel-2.desc: Raised menu surface for keyword and command depth

panel-3.desc: Highest elevation in the rebellion dusk palette

line.desc: Aged parchment border - softer than stark NES white

line-soft.desc: Dusty rose divider for inner structure

text.desc: Warm parchment white for story-heavy dialogue and stats

faint.desc: Low-contrast ash-rose for tertiary UI hints

accent.desc: Wild Rose crimson - primary interactive identity

accent-dk.desc: Deep rebellion maroon for active/pressed states

gold.desc: Aged brass highlight for currency and section callouts

crystal-earth.desc: Earth Crystal analog - weathered bronze earth tone

done.desc: Muted military green for recovered progress

todo.desc: Somber pending state with ash-rose neutrality

excluded.desc: Ailment violet for disabled or set-aside progress

danger.desc: Urgent war-red for critical and destructive actions
